articles.title: Tens of thousands descend on London for rival protests
articles.description: A heavy police operation is in place for the Unite the Kingdom march, organised by Tommy Robinson, and a separate pro-Palestinian protest.

articles.title: The race to replace Starmer is on - but he still faces a momentous choice
articles.description: Labour is consumed by drama, but the PM still faces big decisions - and what could be his final choice.

articles.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
articles.description: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

articles.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
articles.description: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.
